titleStmt.title: SII 27.36: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 36. (A.R. No. 492 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the prākāra of Mahishāsuramardini temple.

This inscription records the exemption from taxes on lands (?) at Nirūvāra, (also referred to as Nirunāra and Nīrāvāra), in favour of the goddess Durgā-Bhagavati of the village by mahāpradhāna Vayijappadaṇṇāyaka, Ajaṁṇa-sāhaṇi, the fourteen of the place, and others in the presence of the chief queen Chikkāyi-Tāyi. Nāgarasa is referred to perhaps as an officer-in-charge of the taxes.
The record is dated Śaka 1255, Āṁgīrasa, Phālguṇa, ba. 10, Mīna 16, Thursday corresponding to 1333 A.D., March 11. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu śakavaruśa 1255 neya Āṁgirasa saṁva
tsarada phālguṇa ba 10 mīnamāsa 16 guruvāradaṁ
du svasti śrīmatu pāṁḍya cakravartti Arirāya ba
savasaṁkhara rāyagajāṁkusa śrīmatpratāpa
cakravartti hoyisaṇa śrīvīraballāḷa dēvarsara
paṭṭada piriyarasi cikkāyi tāyigaḷa śrī
pāda saṁnidhiyalu svasti śrīmanu mahāpra
dhāna vayajappa daṁṇnāyakaru Ajaṁṇasāhaṇiyarū sa
masta pradhānaru bahattara niyōgaṁgaḷū Eraḍu kō
labaḷi muṁtāgi nīrāvārada grā hadinālkū taṁmi
va Ēkastarāgi niruvārada durggābhagavatige niruvā
rada grāmadalu mūṟadhivāsadoḷage ga bāḷi
ga 10 ṟa nāgarasanu Atikā
radalu sarvvamānyavāgi kādaru . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭi rvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi . yidharmmakkārādaru Aḷupi
davaru vāraṇāsiyalu Anaṁtakavileya
koṁdavaru durggābhagavatiya calisida
varu .
Digital edition of SII 27.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
